title: Czechs ditch Taiwan for Beijing
summary_full: PRAGUE – Czech Prime Minister Andrej Babiš has signalled a shift towards a more “pragmatic” China policy, arguing the previous government’s pro-Taiwan approach “damaged Czech companies” while delivering little in return. The move marks a departure from the previous administration’s efforts to deepen ties with Taiwan. Senate Speaker Miloš Vystrčil, a leading pro-Taipeifigure, was denied […]
